name: PA.4 RAG regression baseline
notes: Pytest uses deterministic fixture rankings and answers so CI can gate PA.4 without a live Qdrant or LLM stack.
The live runner can compare stack output with this file via scripts/eval_rag_retrieval.py --baseline docs/benchmark/RAG_PA4_BASELINE.json.

2026-06-22 eval-set scale expansion (see docs/troubleshooting/rag-evalset-scale.md): retrieval 6->16 (added broader English + Korean query variants for the Korean corpus), answer-grounding 3->6 (added Korean grounded + abstain cases), graph 2->4 (added Korean relational queries). Korean coverage closes the multilingual gap where the corpus is Korean but every eval query was English.
